zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Kellet II於1154年出生在英國藍卡爾加斯堂時，他的父親Osbert de Kellet II20歲，母親Avicia de Hammerton11151歲。他和Matilda of Singleton至少有6個兒子。他去世於1207年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾隆斯達爾享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Kellet II于1154年出生在英国藍卡爾加斯堂时，他的父亲Osbert de Kellet II20岁，母亲Avicia de Hammerton11151岁。他和Matilda of Singleton至少有6个儿子。他去世于1207年在英国英格兰藍卡爾隆斯達爾享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kellet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Kellett
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Nether or Over Kellet in Lancashire or Kelleth in Cumbria, named from Old Norse kelda ‘spring’ + hlíth ‘slope’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Kellet II was born in 1154, in Garstang, Lancashire, England, his father, Osbert de Kellet II, was 20 and his mother, Avicia de Hammerton, was 11151. He had at least 6 sons with Matilda of Singleton. He died in 1207, in Lonsdale, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Kellet II est né en 1154, à Garstang, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Osbert de Kellet II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Avicia de Hammerton, avait 11151 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Matilda of Singleton. Il est décédé en 1207, à Lonsdale, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Kellet II 1154 in Garstang, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osbert de Kellet II 20 und seine Mutter Avicia de Hammerton 11151. Er hatte mit Matilda of Singleton mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1207 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Lonsdale, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Kellet II è nato il nel 1154 nel Garstang, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Osbert de Kellet II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Avicia de Hammerton, aveva 11151 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Matilda of Singleton. Morì nel 1207, nel Lonsdale, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancaster, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Kellet IIが1154年にイギリスランカシュアイアガースタンで生まれた時，父Osbert de Kellet IIは20歳，母Avicia de Hammertonは11151歳であった。彼はMatilda of Singletonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1207年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアロンスダルで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Kellet II(이)가 1154년 영국 랭카실르 가스탠그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbert de Kellet II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Avicia de Hammerton(은)는 11151세였다. 그는 Matilda of Singleton(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1207년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 론즈데일에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Kellet II nasceu em 1154, em Garstang, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Osbert de Kellet II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Avicia de Hammerton, tinha 11151 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Matilda of Singleton. Ele faleceu em 1207, em Lonsdale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Kellet II родился в 1154 г. в местности гарстанг, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Osbert de Kellet II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Avicia de Hammerton, 11151. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Matilda of Singleton. Он умер в 1207 г. в местности лонсдеил, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Kellet II nació en 1154, en Garstang, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Osbert de Kellet II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Avicia de Hammerton, tenía 11151 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Matilda of Singleton. Murió en 1207, en Lonsdale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
